ogTitle: Keriri Island vs Kewarra Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Keriri Island vs Kewarra Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keriri Island, Queensland and Kewarra Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keriri Island has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Kewarra Beach (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keriri Island or Kewarra Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keriri Island has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Kewarra Beach scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keriri Island scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Kewarra Beach scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keriri Island or Kewarra Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keriri Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
